title: Inventory sanitation and health data sources for India
outcome: A dated source inventory separating household surveys, administrative data, health data, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for URL, date, access status, methodology, and limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate data sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected with explicit reasons.

title: Triangulate sanitation coverage estimates across data sources at district level
outcome: A district-level comparison of sanitation access and use estimates from NFHS, SBM, and census data with documentation of where estimates diverge.
validation_method: Replicator reruns triangulation with alternative data subsets and confirms divergence patterns.
done_condition: Triangulation identifies districts where administrative and survey estimates diverge by more than 15 percentage points with replication confirmed.

title: Quantify toilet-use versus construction gap at district level
outcome: A district-level analysis of the gap between reported toilet construction and measured toilet use, categorized by gap size and associated factors.
validation_method: Replicator reruns gap analysis with alternative use-definition thresholds.
done_condition: Gap analysis identifies districts with largest construction-use gaps and associated factors with replication confirmed.

title: Correlate sanitation coverage with child health outcomes
outcome: A district-level correlation analysis between sanitation coverage measures and child diarrheal disease, stunting, and under-five mortality, with explicit caveats against causal attribution.
expected_artifact: outputs.md update with health correlation analysis.
validation_method: Replicator reruns correlation with alternative confounder sets and confirms direction and approximate magnitude.
done_condition: Correlation analysis includes confounder controls, explicit non-causal caveats, and replication confirmed.

title: Red-team misuse of sanitation coverage and health data
outcome: A failure-mode review identifying how coverage gaps could be misinterpreted or weaponized against states or communities.
expected_artifact: outputs.md and SAFETY.md linked review note.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms every failure mode has mitigation or blocks publication, then replicated.
done_condition: Every program-relevant claim is qualified with uncertainty or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match sanitation program decision needs
outcome: A field-facing review of whether coverage and gap analyses would change any real SBM or health program decision responsibly.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies actual decision, user, timing, and misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Output has named user, named decision, explicit non-use cases, and replicated field-reality review.
